title: The “Historical Materials BAG”: A New Facilitated Access to Synchrotron X-ray Diffraction Analyses for Cultural Heritage Materials at the European Synchrotron Radiation Facility

file_classifications.paper_evidence: The paper reports synchrotron X-ray powder diffraction applications and no data availability statement or downloadable dataset was identified on the publisher page.
file_classifications.file_evidence: The file is a 3.7 MB PDF from Zenodo, which is consistent with a publication/document rather than a data table or raw measurement file. No tabular structure or figure-data organization is indicated from the file report.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper describes a new ESRF beamtime access mode for synchrotron X-ray powder diffraction studies of cultural heritage materials and reports initial applications to pigments, paintings, ceramics, and wood.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper reports synchrotron X-ray powder diffraction applications to cultural heritage materials, but no explicit dataset location or accessible data files were provided in the available information.
